source.security_note: One hard-coded API credential was detected and redacted from all IR and image outputs.

semantic_ir.generator: Model-assisted semantic compression pilot; output was independently verified against authoritative source

image_accounting.method: ceil(width/32) * ceil(height/32) per page at original detail; sparse final pages cropped to 32-pixel boundaries
image_accounting.format_note: Pixel dimensions determine image tokens. File format and byte size do not change image-token count when dimensions are unchanged.

variants.name: ultra
errors: Invented HTTP status 500 in the retry set

variants.name: dense
variants.recommendation: Best observed quality/token tradeoff in this pilot

variants.name: safe
variants.note: Costs more tokens than sending the semantic IR as text

haystack.selection: Five exact facts selected by the compression subagent and independently verified against raw source before testing
questions: Actual and contradictory documented PDF-render DPI defaults
Color-cache file-size and mtime recreation thresholds
Remote PPTX retry attempts, initial backoff, and transient HTTP statuses
haystack.limitation: This is a small compressor-selected retrieval test, not an independent or patch-correctness benchmark.

dense.note: Two image reads occurred in separate tool turns and the agent emitted both an interim and final answer, inflating cumulative input.

balanced.note: Both image pages were loaded in one visual tool call.

fresh_subagent_runs.interpretation: Representation tokens and complete agent-run input are different. Tool turns repeatedly include system/tool context and resident pages; batch page faults.
